understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level (currently BP35) without dying; complete the level within the allowed turns/attempts and continue progressing until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can either move one step (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN depending on available paths/physics) or CLICK a specified tile. Gravity pulls the player in the current gravity direction after movement, often causing the player to fall until landing on a supporting tile. Clicking a clickable tile removes it (as shown by 'Clickable tiles removed at ...') and can change the path/support so that gravity moves you into new areas. Landing on a spike tile ends the attempt immediately and the level restarts; you get 2 attempts per level and up to 50 turns per attempt. Undo (when available) would revert the last action/state to recover from mistakes, but it was not used in the provided sequence.
